title: Frontend Batch 12 - Sanitization and Public Indexing Helper Reinforcement
summary: Reinforced HTML sanitizer URL and attribute safety plus public sitemap date and slug fallbacks.
behaviorBugsFound: Protocol-relative href and src values were accepted by the DOM sanitizer.
Server-side sanitizer fallback could leak unquoted event handlers.
Server-side sanitizer fallback could leak unquoted javascript href/src values.
Server-side sanitizer fallback could preserve protocol-relative media URLs.
Sitemap generation could emit Invalid Date for malformed publishedAt values.
Sitemap generation could emit /undefined, /null, or blank detail URLs for malformed slugs.

validation.command: npx skills find nextjs security testing
validation.notes: External skills found; no new skill installed.

validation.result: failed before fixes, passed after fixes

validation.notes: Focused rerun after one transient full-suite Pact work-list failure; 1 file, 6 tests.

remainingGaps: Public generateMetadata failure/null-detail branches still need focused server module coverage.
Robots metadata is simple but not directly unit-tested.
The sanitizer server fallback remains a constrained regex fallback rather than a full parser.
Public list/card date formatting remains component-local.
recommendation: Proceed to Frontend Batch 13 - Public Metadata and Server Route Fallback Reinforcement.
